subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned towards Me! Hearken unto the Call of the Wronged One. Verily, He maketh mention of thee with that which hath enraptured hearts and souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل اسمع ندآء المظلوم انه ذکرک بما انجذبت به الافئده و القلوب و
subcodes.subjects: @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment
